lines.speaker: Thormac
lines.text: Hello I am Thormac the sorcerer.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you need anything?

lines.speaker: Thormac
lines.text: Not right now, but thank you for offering.

lines.speaker: Thormac
lines.text: Hello I am Thormac the sorcerer. I don't suppose you could be of assistance to me?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you need assistance with?

lines.speaker: Thormac
lines.text: I've lost my pet scorpions. They're lesser Kharid scorpions, a very rare breed.

lines.speaker: Thormac
lines.text: I left their cage door open, now I don't know where they've gone.

lines.speaker: Thormac
lines.text: There's three of them, and they're quick little beasties. They're all over Gielinor.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How would I go about catching them?

lines.speaker: Thormac
lines.text: Well I have a scorpion cage here which you can use to catch them in.

lines.speaker: Thormac
lines.text: If you go up to the village of Seers, to the North of here, one of them will be able to tell you where the scorpions are now.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, I will do it then.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm not interested.

lines.speaker: Thormac
lines.text: Blast! I suppose I'll have to find someone else then.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm a little busy.

lines.speaker: Thormac
lines.text: Fair enough.

lines.speaker: Thormac
lines.text: How goes your quest?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've not caught all the scorpions yet.

lines.speaker: Thormac
lines.text: Well remember to go speak to the Seers, North of here, if you need any help.

lines.speaker: Seer
lines.text: Many greetings.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I need to locate some scorpions.

lines.speaker: Seer
lines.text: Well you have come to the right place. I am a master of animal detection.

lines.speaker: Seer
lines.text: Do you need to locate any particular scorpion? Scorpions are a creature somewhat in abundance.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm looking for some lesser Kharid scorpions. They belong to Thormac the Sorcerer.

lines.speaker: Seer
lines.text: Let me look into my looking glass.

lines.speaker: Seer
lines.text: I can see a scorpion that you seek. It would appear to be near some nasty spiders. I can see two coffins there as well.

lines.speaker: Seer
lines.text: The scorpion seems to be going through some crack in the wall. It's gone into some sort of secret room.

lines.speaker: Seer
lines.text: Well see if you can find that scorpion then, and I'll try and get you some information on the others.

lines.speaker: Seer
lines.text: Many greetings.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where did you say that scorpion was again?

lines.speaker: Seer
lines.text: Let me look into my looking glass.

sections.title: Attempting to pick up the scorpion
Using the scorpion cage on the scorpion

lines.speaker: Seer
lines.text: Many greetings.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've retrieved the scorpion from near the spiders.

lines.speaker: Seer
lines.text: Well, I've checked my looking glass. There seems to be a kharid scorpion in a little village in the east, surrounded by lots of uncivilised-looking warriors. Some kind of merchant there seems to have picked it up.

lines.speaker: Seer
lines.text: That's all I can tell you about that scorpion.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Any more scorpions?

lines.speaker: Seer
lines.text: It's good that you should ask. I have information on the last scorpion for you.

lines.speaker: Seer
lines.text: It seems to be in some sort of upstairs room. There seems to be some sort of brown clothing lying on a table.

lines.speaker: Peksa
lines.text: Are you interested in buying or selling a helmet?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've heard you have a small scorpion in your possession.

lines.speaker: Peksa
lines.text: Now how could you know about that, I wonder? Mind you, I don't have it anymore.

lines.speaker: Peksa
lines.text: I gave it as a present to my brother Ivor when I visited our outpost northwest of Camelot.

lines.speaker: Peksa
lines.text: Well, actually I hid it in his bed so it would nip him. It was a bit of a surprise gift.

sections.title: Attempting to pick up a scorpion
Using the scorpion cage on a scorpion

lines.speaker: Thormac
lines.text: How goes your quest?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have retrieved all your scorpions.

lines.speaker: Thormac
lines.text: Aha, my little scorpions home at last!
